untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern requires geometric shape recognition (converging and expanding trendlines forming diamond) which cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators. The intraformation trading strategy (buy bottoms, sell tops, short, cover bottoms) requires multi-level pivot detection within a bounded formation. Used price_pos_20 extremes as proxy for range extremes, Donchian midline for diamond centerline, and wick patterns for intrabar trading, but true diamond geometry detection is not achievable with these indicators alone.
